title: Smoky Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender lamb, smoky flavors, and a rich broth.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and carrots to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the broth, tomato paste, and browned lamb to the pot.
Bring the stew to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
